calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Creditor's Adjustment Bureau, Inc. appearing represented by George Aposhian, Esq., via zoom.
Defendant AK Reonovation Group Inc. not appearing.

The court is aware of the 170.6 challenge to Judge Tong. The court does not have a bench officer available to hear this matter today. Mr. Aposhian verbally rescinds his 1706 challenge to Judge Michelle Tong.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, and against Defendant AK Renovation Group Inc., as follows:

Damages: $57,049.36
Prejudgment Interest: $8,856.54
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $655.16

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $69,386.06

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Continued To Apr-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-04-2026 Continued To Mar-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2025 Continued To Mar-18-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
